blocks.text: Attach a 36 mm socket wrench (D) to the gearbox flange (E) with a 10 x 105 mm flange bolt (A), flat washer (B), and 10 mm nut (C). Flat washers should be used with an outside diameter of 21 mm for the collar (F). While holding the nut with a wrench, tighten the flange bolt with one wrench and remove the gearbox mount bushing (G).

Apply soapy water to the surface of the press-fit portion of the new gearbox mount bushing (A) and the hole in the gearbox side, then squish the edge of the bushing (B) and press it into the hole in the gearbox flange. Install the 36 mm socket wrench (F) with 10 x 105 mm flange bolt (C), flat washer (D) and 10 mm nut (E) in the same manner as for removal. Tighten the flange bolt with one wrench while holding the nut with the other wrench and push in the gearbox mount bushing.

items.text: Soapy water is a solution of neutral detergent diluted to 50% with water.
Soapy water is a solution of neutral detergent diluted to 50% with water.
After press-fitting, check that there is no bite or lift on all edges (G) of both sides of the mounting bushing.
After press-fitting, check that there is no bite or lift on all edges (G) of both sides of the mounting bushing.
